# Naviary Tech Blog

Naviary is a parrot breeding and management platform focused on building a structured, data-driven breeding system.
Main site: https://naviary.io

This blog shares engineering work behind Naviary, including software architecture, system design, migration lessons, and technical decisions.

## Languages

- [Korean Home](https://tech.naviary.io/ko/): Main homepage for Korean content
- [English Home](https://tech.naviary.io/en/): Main homepage for English content

## Article Indexes

- [Korean Articles](https://tech.naviary.io/ko/articles/): Paginated list of Korean technical articles
- [English Articles](https://tech.naviary.io/en/articles/): Paginated list of English technical articles

## Feeds

- [All Posts RSS](https://tech.naviary.io/rss.xml): Combined RSS feed for all published posts
- [Korean RSS](https://tech.naviary.io/ko/rss.xml): RSS feed for Korean posts
- [English RSS](https://tech.naviary.io/en/rss.xml): RSS feed for English posts

## Open Source

- [Korean Open Source](https://tech.naviary.io/ko/open-source/): Open source related information in Korean
- [English Open Source](https://tech.naviary.io/en/open-source/): Open source related information in English

## Discovery

- [Sitemap](https://tech.naviary.io/sitemap.xml): Full list of published pages and posts

## URL Patterns

- Korean posts: `https://tech.naviary.io/ko/articles/post/{slug}/`
- English posts: `https://tech.naviary.io/en/articles/post/{slug}/`

## Notes

- The root URL `https://tech.naviary.io/` may redirect by language preference. Prefer direct locale-specific URLs.
- Published content is available through article index pages, RSS feeds, and the sitemap.

## Content License

- Content and public assets are licensed under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 unless otherwise noted.
- Code and configuration files are licensed under MIT.
